content.scenarioHint: 你和一位新认识的朋友在咖啡馆聊得很愉快，现在要离开，你想主动提议保持联系并约定下次见面。
expectedAnswers: This was so fun—can we grab coffee again next week?
I really enjoyed chatting! Let’s connect on Instagram and plan to meet up soon.
Mind if we swap numbers? I’d love to catch up again soon.
Let’s not say goodbye just yet—how about a video call next weekend?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了希望保持联系并约定下次互动的意图
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确，是否避免中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达和连接词
关键词覆盖：是否包含如 'next week', 'connect', 'meet up', 'catch up' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve got to head out, but let’s catch up soon!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，但我们很快再聊吧！
expectedAnswers: Definitely! Let’s do a Zoom call next Friday.
Sounds good—I’ll slide into your DMs this weekend!
Absolutely! How about coffee next week?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应了‘下次再聊’的邀请
语言准确性：语法是否正确，是否使用自然口语表达
表达自然度：是否符合轻松友好的告别语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 catch up, next week, DMs, Zoom 等关键词
